basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Office Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Office Executive Notification 2026 has been released on 5 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Hyderabad. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Hyderabad Office Executive Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in any stream with minimum 65% marks
qualification.details: Bachelor’s degree in any stream with a minimum of 65% marks (or CGPA/Grade 6.5 or above) from a recognized university. Minimum 6 months of relevant work experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Office Executive Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad Office Executive recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIT Hyderabad Office Executive position is 26th May 2026. Ensure all details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Office Executive post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s degree in any stream with a minimum of 65% marks or an equivalent CGPA/Grade from a recognized university to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any work experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 6 months of relevant work experience is required for the Office Executive position at IIT Hyderabad. This experience should be in a related field.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Office Executive role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Office Executive post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the prevailing government norms and regulations.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Office Executive position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Office Executive post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month. This is a fixed monthly remuneration.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the IIT Hyderabad Office Executive recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official IIT Hyderabad website or the direct application link provided. Ensure all required documents are uploaded and the form is submitted by the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Office Executive role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Office Executive position at IIT Hyderabad typically involves a Written Test, followed by a Skill Test, and finally an Interview. Candidates must clear all stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the IIT Hyderabad Office Executive recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Office Executive recruitment at IIT Hyderabad. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Office Executive post at IIT Hyderabad is on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains detailed information about the recruitment process and requirements.
